import * as React from "react"; import { useLayoutEffect } from "./utils.js"; import { useRouter } from "./useRouter.js"; function useNavigate(_defaultOpts) { const router = useRouter(); return React.useCallback( (options) => { return router.navigate({ ...options, from: options.from ?? _defaultOpts?.from }); }, [_defaultOpts?.from, router] ); } function Navigate(props) { const router = useRouter(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const previousPropsRef = React.useRef(null); useLayoutEffect(() => { if (previousPropsRef.current !== props) { navigate(props); previousPropsRef.current = props; } }, [router, props, navigate]); return null; } export { Navigate, useNavigate }; //# sourceMappingURL=useNavigate.js.map
